name: Jake Bostwick
bio: English combat sports veteran who built an 18-10 MMA record across Cage Warriors, Cage Rage, and Ultimate Challenge MMA, winning titles at three separate promotions. Transitioned to bare-knuckle boxing in 2020 and has fought notable BKFC names including Julian Lane, Isaac Doolittle, Erick Lozano, and Francesco Ricchi. Known as a technical counter-striker who is dangerous over 10-minute bouts.
